description_long: This object is a medium-sized pumpkin with a smooth, rounded body and a slightly flattened base, topped by a short, greenish-brown stem. The pumpkin's surface is a uniform orange color, with subtle shading that suggests a matte finish. On one side, a traditional jack-o'-lantern face is carved, featuring two triangular eyes and a jagged, toothy mouth, all cut cleanly into the pumpkin's surface. The carving style is simple and geometric, with sharp angles and no additional decorative motifs. The rest of the pumpkin is unadorned, with no visible accessories or embellishments. The stem is clearly visible and appears sturdy, adding to the pumpkin's realistic appearance.
description: A medium orange pumpkin with a greenish stem and a classic jack-o'-lantern face carved on one side, featuring triangular eyes and a jagged mouth.
description_view_0: The pumpkin is shown from the back, displaying its smooth, uncarved orange surface and the greenish stem at the top.
description_view_1: The front view reveals the carved jack-o'-lantern face with triangular eyes and a jagged mouth, as well as the stem.
description_view_2: This side view shows the pumpkin's rounded body and stem, with only a hint of the facial cutouts visible at the edge.
description_view_3: The opposite side of the pumpkin is visible, showing a smooth, uncarved surface and the angled stem.
attribute_carving_pattern: Traditional jack-o'-lantern style with two triangular eyes and a jagged, toothy mouth; geometric and simple with no additional motifs or etchings.
